title: FeFe's Storage
description: Simple wooden crates matching the vanilla look
body:
## What is this mod all about?

Simple storage mod adding wooden crates that match the vanilla look.

Crates offer 54 slots of storage space in just one block aka a one block solution for a double chest amount of space.


## Supported versions

|                     | Fabric         | Forge              |
|---------------------|:--------------:|:------------------:|
| 1.19.2              | ✔️              | ✔️               |
| 1.20                | ✔️              | ❌               |
| 1.20.1              | ✔️              | ✔️              |


I will not be making backports to older Minecraft versions.
But updated versions for upcoming Minecraft versions can be expected.
